abbreviations.definition: decrease (single crochet 2 together or invisible decrease)
increase (2 single crochet in one stitch)

materials: Worsted/aran (#4) weight yarn in your choice of color

rounds.summary: Create a magic ring and work six single crochets into it.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.summary: Repeat single crochet and increase three times.
rounds.title: Round 2

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 3

rounds.summary: Repeat two single crochets and an increase three times.
rounds.title: Round 4

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 5

rounds.rawInstruction: sc (both loops), in flo of next st (hdc, 2 dc, hdc) to form first ear, sc 3 (both loops), in flo of next st (hdc, 2 dc, hdc) to form second ear, sc 6 (both loops). (18)
rounds.summary: Work single crochets and form two ears using front loop stitches.
rounds.title: Round 6

rounds.rawInstruction: sc (both loops), bend first ear forward and sc in blo of st from round 5, sc 3 (both loops), bend second ear forward and sc in blo of st from round 5, sc 6 (both loops). (12)
rounds.summary: Secure ears by working into back loops of round 5.
rounds.title: Round 7

rounds.summary: Repeat single crochet and increase six times.
rounds.title: Round 8

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around for two rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 9-10

rounds.summary: Repeat five single crochets and an increase three times.
rounds.title: Round 11

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around for two rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 12-13

rounds.summary: Repeat six single crochets and an increase four times.
rounds.title: Round 14

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around for three rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 15-17

rounds.summary: Repeat two single crochets and a decrease six times.
rounds.title: Round 18

rounds.summary: Repeat single crochet and a decrease six times.
rounds.title: Round 19

rounds.summary: Insert catnip and fiber fill into the body.
rounds.title: Add catnip and stuffing.

rounds.rawInstruction: dec 3, ch 15, starting in 2nd ch from hook sc across chs, dec 3. (20)
rounds.summary: Decrease three times, chain fifteen, single crochet across chain, and decrease three times.
rounds.title: Round 20

rounds.summary: Fasten off yarn and stitch the opening closed.
rounds.title: Finish off and sew closed.
